scenes.title: SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: Tour the floor plan, pick a style, and see the apartment before it exists.
scenes.fallback_narration: Tour the floor plan, pick a style, and see the apartment before it exists.
scenes.subtitle: SEE IT BEFORE IT IS BUILT.
scenes.original_narration: A warm, layered mid‑century inspired home with an earthy palette anchored in emerald greens, reclaimed walnut, brass accents and. That is what Haus builds for Springmarc.

scenes.title: FLOOR PLANS
scenes.narration: Choose one, two, or three bedrooms, with pricing matched to each plan.
scenes.fallback_narration: Compare one, two, and three bedroom plans with clear starting prices.
scenes.subtitle: 1B1, 2B2, AND 3B2 AVAILABLE
scenes.original_narration: Choose one, two, or three bedrooms, with pricing matched to each plan.

scenes.title: LIVING
scenes.narration: Living: bay-window view on right wall.
scenes.fallback_narration: Living: bay-window view on right wall.
scenes.subtitle: BAY-WINDOW VIEW ON RIGHT WALL
must_include: reclaimed walnut sofa and coffee table
large potted plant (e.g., fiddle leaf fig)
brass floor lamp or sconce for warm practical glow
scenes.original_narration: Warm, layered living room with botanical focus and gallery energy

scenes.title: KITCHEN
scenes.narration: Green-tile & walnut kitchen detail: tactile, minimal, functional
scenes.fallback_narration: Kitchen: deep green vertical tile backsplash.
scenes.subtitle: DEEP GREEN VERTICAL TILE BACKSPLASH
must_include: walnut cabinetry and minimal brass hardware
marble/honed counter vignette (cutting board, small herb)
walnut cabinet faces with minimal brass hardware
marble or honed stone counter vignette (cutting board, ceramics)
scenes.original_narration: Green-tile & walnut kitchen detail: tactile, minimal, functional

scenes.title: BEDROOM
scenes.narration: Mid‑century gallery bedroom with warm ochre accents
scenes.subtitle: LOW WALNUT PLATFORM BED
must_include: gallery wall with warm ochre/orange art
gallery wall with warm accent art (ochre/orange)
scenes.original_narration: Mid‑century gallery bedroom with warm ochre accents

scenes.title: BEDROOM
scenes.narration: Calm secondary bedroom / guest with soft botanical accents
scenes.subtitle: LOW-PROFILE BED OR DAYBED
scenes.original_narration: Calm secondary bedroom / guest with soft botanical accents

scenes.title: DINING
scenes.narration: Bright bay dining with tactile table styling
scenes.subtitle: ROUNDOVAL WOOD DINING TABLE
must_include: textured runner and a small ceramic vignette
scenes.original_narration: Bright bay dining with tactile table styling

scenes.title: HAUS FOR SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: From floor plan to finished reel, Haus turns the vision into a tour.
scenes.fallback_narration: From floor plan to finished reel, Haus turns the vision into a tour.
scenes.subtitle: FROM FLOOR PLAN TO BUYER REEL.
scenes.original_narration: From floor plan to Earthy Mid‑Century Botanical — reclaimed walnut (furniture, shelving), every room, buyer ready.
